title: Akira
tmdbOverview: A secret military project endangers Neo-Tokyo when it turns a biker gang member into a rampaging psychic psychopath that only two teenagers and a group of psychics can stop.
synopsis: Akira (1988) is a animation, science fiction and action film from Japan. It's highly rated, holding a strong 8.0 on IMDb. It's one of the titles we feature across our 1980s and genre rankings. It carries a R certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
